title: System Coherence & Era Event Mesh
purpose: Connect new era progression, outposts, guilds, factions, policies, logistics, water reserves, industry, and crises to event choices and monthly resolution.

audit.policyGate: Camp Policies are hidden and inactive until campPolicies/projectPlanning research or meetingHall exists.
audit.stageGoals: Stages after Small Town now have explicit prerequisites instead of auto-progressing on generic logs.
audit.researchGate: signalNetwork and advanced research now unlock by stage rank, not exact stage only.
audit.outpostLoop: Discovered locations can become outposts, outposts produce monthly yield, and low security triggers risks/events.
audit.guildLoop: Trade Hub uses guild halls and macro production alongside existing micro labor.
audit.factionLoop: City-State updates faction approval monthly and can trigger rebellion warning events.
audit.crisisLoop: Kingdom-level pressure connects steel, influence, threat, siege materials, manpower, and defensive choices.

godotPortNote: Events in this layer should eventually become data-driven scenario nodes keyed by requiredStage, requiredBuilding, requiredResearch, resourceBand, factionApproval, and mapNode.
